example: The class teacher will mark your attendance every day.
zh: 班導師，負責管理班級的老師

example: MAM marked the attendance of all children.
During recess, the kids were having lunch together.
Our new MAM is very strict and does not allow us to talk in class.
We will be the first to get scolded by the new strict teacher.
The teacher asked the students to introduce themselves.
MAM thought the kids were a bit nervous because of her.
The teacher suggested playing a game to help the students introduce themselves.
The teacher gave us a math quiz.
All the kids started whispering to each other.
I don't want any disturbances in my class.
How can you study maths if you don't have energy?
They increased their speeds to avoid being late.
I think all of you are scared of me.
All the kids got friendly with the new MAM.
The kids resumed their classes with their previous teacher.
